Username must be 3-16 characters!: Nkombo ya mosaleli esengeli kozala na bilembo 3-16!
Password must contain at least one upper: Mot de passe esengeli kozala na ata lɛtrɛ moko ya monene!
Password must be 8-16 characters!: Mot de passe esengeli kozala na ba caractères 8-16!
Passwords do not match!: Ba mots de passe ekokani te!
● Passwords must match: ● Ba mots de passe esengeli kokokana
Password must contain at least one symbo: Mot de passe esengeli kozala na ata elembo moko!
● Username Length Must Be Between 3-16: ● Bolai ya Nkombo ya Mosaleli Esengeli kozala Kati na 3-16
● Password Length Must Be Between 8-16: ● Bolai ya mot de passe esengeli kozala kati na 8-16
Password must contain at least one lower: Mot de passe esengeli kozala na ata letre moko ya mike!
Password must contain at least one numbe: Mot de passe esengeli kozala na ata nimero moko!
Tyá fraze moko na monɔkɔ na yo...
